title: 更好的盔甲架│Better Armor Stand
description: 盔甲架預設有手臂、盔甲架動作可調整等。│Default armor stand has arms, adjustable armor stand posing and more.
body:
### The creators of this data pack plan to use a better mechanism to implement the original functionality. The creators will not make any changes to this data pack until the revamp is completed.│本資料包創作者計畫使用更優質的機制去實現原來的功能，在完成翻新之前，本資料包創作者不會對於此資料包進行任何更動。
# 功能Function
1. 盔甲架預設帶有手臂。│Armor stands have arms by default.
2. 潛行並手持骨頭時，對盔甲架按下左鍵即可調整其姿勢。│While sneaking and holding a bone, left-clicking an armor stand will adjust its posture.
3. 潛行並手持木棒時，對盔甲架按下左鍵便可將盔甲架在大型與小型之間切換。│While sneaking and holding a stick, left-clicking an armor stand will toggle the armor stand between large and small.
4. 潛行時對盔甲架按下右鍵即可將主手的物品放到盔甲架主手、副手的物品放到盔甲架副手。│When sneaking, right-clicking an armor stand will place items in the main hand on the armor stand's main hand, and items in the off-hand on the armor stand's off-hand.
5. 潛行時對盔甲架按下左鍵時，如果自身主手沒有物品，則將取下盔甲架主手物品；如果是副手沒有物品，則取下副手物品。│When you press the left button on an armor stand while sneaking, if there is no item in your main hand, the item in the main hand of the armor stand will be taken to your main hand; if there is no item in your off-hand, the item in the off-hand of the armor stand will be taken to your off-hand.
# 更多│More
[點我](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT)查看更多我的作品。│[Click me](https://modrinth.com/user/Special_TT) to see more of my works.
